overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking across a wooden suspension bridge into a medieval fortified town. The atmosphere is dark and moody with overcast skies and fog, as the character passes through a stone gate and navigates cobblestone streets patrolled by guards.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily across the wooden bridge toward the stone gate

notable_agents.action: hooded figure walking toward camera across the bridge

heavy iron chains suspending the bridge
heavy iron chains suspending the bridge
large medieval stone archway with portcullis at the bridge end

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks across a wooden suspension bridge with iron chain railings, approaching a large stone gate archway in the distance. The environment is foggy and overcast, with mist visible over the water below. A hooded figure approaches from the opposite direction.

events.description: entering the dark stone gate archway from the wooden bridge

agents.ego_description: walking through the enclosed stone gate tunnel

notable_agents.action: group of townspeople walking through the gate tunnel ahead

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone walls of the gate passage
rough-hewn stone walls of the gate passage
cobblestone road surface visible through the gate

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into the dark, enclosed stone gate tunnel with rough walls on both sides. The wooden bridge disappears behind as Geralt moves deeper into the passage. Groups of townspeople are visible ahead, walking through the gate toward the open town.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval town square with guard patrols

events.description: exiting the gate into the open town area with cobblestone streets

agents.ego_description: walking through the town square passing guards in red armor patrolling the area

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the gate into the open town square, the environment opens up to reveal cobblestone streets lined with medieval stone buildings. Guards in red armor patrol the area, with one standing prominently on the right. A tall stone watchtower rises in the distance on the left.

events.description: turning into narrower alleyway with high walls and timber-framed buildings

agents.ego_description: navigating through narrow alleyways passing by medieval buildings and a few townspeople

notable_agents.action: shirtless man with tattoos standing near the building wall

entered.detail: medieval timber-framed houses with glowing windows
high stone walls enclosing the narrow passage
stacked wooden barrels in a small courtyard area

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions into narrower back streets and alleyways with high stone walls on the left and timber-framed houses on the right. The space becomes more enclosed with less sky visible. A shirtless man with tattoos stands near the wall, and wooden barrels are stacked in a small courtyard area as the path continues deeper into the town.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a misty suspension bridge into the increasingly enclosed medieval streets of a fortified town. It begins with Geralt crossing a wooden bridge with iron chain railings under an overcast sky, moving through dense fog toward a distant stone gate. As he enters the gate, the open landscape vanishes, replaced by the dark, rough-walled confines of a stone tunnel filled with passing townspeople. The scene then expands into a wide cobblestone square lined with stone buildings and a tall watchtower, where guards in red armor patrol the open area. Finally, the camera shifts away from the square into narrow alleyways and back streets, where high stone walls and timber-framed houses close in around a courtyard of stacked barrels and a tattooed man.
